import pytest
from source import bucketsort

def test_bucketsort_sorted_output():
    arr = [3, 1, 2, 1]  # includes repeated values
    k = 4
    expected = [1, 1, 2, 3]
    result = bucketsort(arr, k)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected sorted list {expected}, got {result}"
